title: MetaGov DAO Treasury Allocation
description: The MetaGov DAO community is split on whether to allocate 500,000 USDC from the treasury to fund a new NFT marketplace. The plaintiff argues this investment will generate 3x returns based on market analysis. The opposition claims the risk is too high and funds should be reserved for protocol development.
evidence: Market analysis report showing 85% of NFT marketplaces fail within 18 months
Competitor analysis showing 3 similar projects launched in the past quarter
Community vote: 52% for, 48% against (below 66% supermajority requirement)
Treasury balance: 2.1M USDC with 800K earmarked for ongoing development
Projected ROI analysis by plaintiff showing 3x returns in 24 months
